cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.10)
project(D3D12MAd LANGUAGES CXX)

add_library(D3D12MAd STATIC IMPORTED GLOBAL)

set_target_properties(D3D12MAd PROPERTIES
        INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include"
        IMPORTED_LOCATION "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/D3D12MAd.lib"
)
